prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约 25265→24830→24430→32319→34876 名，2021–2023 年基本稳定在 2.4–2.5 万名区间，2024 年大幅后移至 32319 名（较 2023 年后移约 7889 名），2025 年继续后移至 34876 名（较 2024 年后移约 2557 名），近两年累计后移约 10446 名，下行趋势明显；2025 年基准位次约 34876 名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划 2021 年 37 人→2022 年 43 人→2023 年 44 人→2024 年 49 人→2025 年 51 人，持续小幅扩招；2026 年计划增至 54 人，较 2025 年扩招约 5.88%，扩招对竞争压力有一定缓解作用，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第 76–77 名（2026 年排名第 76 名），属于中上水平 211 院校，办学层次稳定；2022 年高考周期内曾出现师德师风类偏负面事件（教师与学生不正当关系），但 2026 年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音学校热度未进入全国前 106 名，短视频平台关注度一般，未出现明显的报考热度异常信号；该校以矿业工程、安全科学与工程为传统优势领域，招生专业涵盖计算机、电气、机械、安全、地质、环境等方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度高热推荐，对高分考生吸引力强；土木建筑、工商管理类、生化环材类热度偏低或明显劝退；浙江省 2021–2025 年综合类考生数持续增长（253436→268996→277524→281057→290790），2026 年总考生数约 400000 人，按近年综合类占比估算综合考生约 400000 人，较 2025 年大幅增加约 37.5%，竞争显著加剧；该校位于北京，对浙江考生具有地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年招生计划小幅扩招（+5.88%）、浙江省考生数大幅增加（约 +37.5%）、声誉中性无负面冲击等因素，竞争加剧是主导力量，预计 2026 年最低录取位次在 2025 年基准 34876 名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约 36407 名，区间 35907–36907 名。

- 人工智能。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 35907–36907 名内的考生，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<35907 名）可重点冲刺计算机科学与技术、电气工程及其自动化等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（约 36907 名）应以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang Comprehensive category were approximately 25265→24830→24430→32319→34876. From 2021 to 2023, it was basically stable in the range of 24,000–25,000. In 2024, it significantly dropped to 32319 (a drop of about 7889 places compared to 2023). In 2025, it further dropped to 34876 (a drop of about 2557 places compared to 2024). The cumulative drop over the past two years is about 10,446 places, showing a clear downward trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 34876. The enrollment plan for Zhejiang Comprehensive category was 37 in 2021→43 in 2022→44 in 2023→49 in 2024→51 in 2025, with continuous slight expansion. The 2026 plan increases to 54, an expansion of about 5.88% compared to 2025, which provides some relief to competition pressure but is limited in magnitude.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the Soft Science China University Ranking has been stable around 76–77 in recent years (ranked 76th in 2026), belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 institutions, with a stable academic level. During the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, there was a somewhat negative incident related to teacher ethics (improper relationship between teacher and student), but in the 2026 cycle, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. The university's Douyin popularity did not enter the top 106 nationally, indicating average attention on short video platforms, with no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. The university's traditional strengths are in mining engineering and safety science and engineering, with enrollment majors covering computer science, electrical engineering, mechanical engineering, safety engineering, geology, environmental science, etc.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication are highly popular and recommended, attracting high-scoring candidates. Majors like Civil Engineering, Business Administration, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are less popular or clearly discouraged. The number of candidates in Zhejiang Comprehensive category from 2021 to 2025 has been continuously increasing (253436→268996→277524→281057→290790). In 2026, the total number of candidates is about 400,000. Based on the recent proportion of Comprehensive candidates, it is estimated that there will be about 400,000 Comprehensive candidates, an increase of about 37.5% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has regional appeal for Zhejiang candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+5.88%), the significant increase in the number of candidates in Zhejiang (about +37.5%), and the neutral reputation without negative impact, intensified competition is the dominant factor. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to drop from the 2025 baseline of 34876. The predicted minimum ranking is about 36407, with a range of 35907–36907.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Engineering (including Mechanical Engineering, Robotics Engineering)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- New Energy Science and Engineering
- English
- Administrative Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Safety Science and Engineering (including Safety Engineering, Fire Engineering, Emergency Technology and Management)
- Carbon Storage Science and Engineering
- Intelligent Construction
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- Business Administration (including Business Administration, Accounting, Big Data Management and Application)
- Geophysics
- Environmental Engineering
- Geology (including Geological Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering)
- Civil Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 35907–36907 are advised to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as reach and Tier 3 majors as safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<35907) can focus on reaching for popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation. Candidates with rankings near the upper bound of the range (about 36907) should mainly apply for Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranked Tier 2 majors.
